text.title: Product Manager Workflows Core Rules
text.summary: 6 testable rules grounding Product Manager Workflows plus the universal skip/run routing pair (referenced by the decision tree).

rule.statement: Bootstrap Phase 4 user confirmation MUST be explicit; LLMs MUST NOT simulate user approval — hard-fail with NEEDS-HUMAN if no approval token is received.
rule.rationale: An unsigned constitution is not a constitution. LLMs eager to complete will invent answers; bootstrap must detect non-interactive mode and exit.

rule.statement: Every spec MUST carry a RICE row (reach/impact/confidence/effort) in frontmatter before leaving backlog; grooming MUST reject specs without RICE.
rule.rationale: Unscored backlog items cannot be prioritised; the rice-reorder script and sprint kickoff agent ignore items without frontmatter RICE.

rule.statement: Agents MUST refuse to invent MLP WOW features not grounded in mvp-scope-analysis.md or competitive-analysis.md; speculative features MUST land under 'Deferred — needs validation'.
rule.rationale: MLP hallucination — proposing WOW features without competitor evidence — is the primary observed failure mode of faion-mlp-agent.

rule.statement: Concurrent PM agents MUST take a flock on .aidocs/.numbering.lock before assigning the next feature {NN} or TASK_{NNN}.
rule.rationale: Numbering collisions break spec filenames and all downstream tracker references; lockless concurrent assignment is the root cause of seen FR-NN duplicates.

rule.statement: .aidocs/features/ MUST be the planning source of truth; Jira/Linear MUST be treated as an execution mirror — never the reverse.
rule.rationale: Tracker tickets get deleted or migrated; the .aidocs/ tree has git history. Making tracker authoritative loses history when tickets are deleted.

rule.statement: The five faion-mlp-agent modes MUST run strictly in sequence: analyze → find-gaps → propose → update → plan; each mode persists its artefact so a failed run resumes.
rule.rationale: Running propose before analyze produces WOW features ungrounded in competitor evidence; sequencing is the gate that prevents speculation.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` do not ALL hold OR any disqualifier in `## Skip If` fires, the agent MUST skip this methodology and document the skip reason in the cycle artefact.
rule.rationale: A minimum-form decision tree must route 'preconditions-not-satisfied' to skip; this rule is the canonical target.

rule.statement: If preconditions in `## Applies If` ALL hold AND no disqualifier fires, the agent MUST run the methodology end-to-end and produce the artefact specified in 02-output-contract.xml.
rule.rationale: Pair to skip-this-methodology; together they form the always-present minimal route.
